children.heading: Child with a disability; infant or toddler with a disability
children.label: 1 Child with a disability; infant or toddler with a disability
children.text: The terms “child with a disability” and “infant or toddler with a disability” have the meanings given the terms in sections 1401 and 1431 of title 20.

children.label: A
children.text: is licensed, regulated, registered, or otherwise legally operating, under State and local law; and

children.label: B
children.text: satisfies the State and local requirements,

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 3 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Health and Human Services.

children.heading: State
children.label: 4 State
children.text: The term “State” means any of the several States of the United States, the District of Columbia, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, the United States Virgin Islands, Guam, American Samoa, and the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands.
